message:
fix(gemini): accumulate text before emitting Start event

The Gemini provider was losing the first text chunk for single-chunk
responses.  When the entire response fit in one SSE message, the Start
event was emitted before the text was pushed into the partial message,
so the Done event had empty content.  Move text accumulation before
the `!started` check so the Start event's partial already contains the
text.

Also adds cross-provider streaming_event_parity and error_handling_parity
E2E tests (bd-1uch).  All 60 E2E tests pass across 6 providers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
